title: Statistics
subtitle: Check your stats
errorHint: Check that the server is running and your network connection.

info.day:
Cumulative spending from the start of the month up to today compared to the same period in the previous month.
Example: October 1–5 vs September 1–5.
info.week:
Cumulative spending of the past week compared to the previous week.
Example: week of October 6 vs week of October 13.
info.month:
Total spent since the start of the month compared to the previous month. Comparison may be misleading early in the month.
Example: October vs September.
info.year:
Spending in the current year compared to the previous year.
Example: 2025 vs 2024.
